meta.title: Be Community — We build belonging
meta.description: Experience and community consulting for schools and companies in Greater Mexico City. We raise retention, satisfaction and belonging.

hero.lead: We help schools and companies across Greater Mexico City make their communities want to stay. With method and warmth.

paths.title: Two worlds, one way of building community.
paths.colegiosText: Retain students, cut teacher turnover and turn your school into a community families never want to leave.
paths.empresasText: Turn customers into community with Customer Experience consulting and digital transformation that actually feels human.

manifesto.l5: We design the experience that makes people want to stay.

services.title: One method, applied to every touchpoint.
services.s1Text: Diagnosis and design of value-added experiences that differentiate your school and build community.
services.s2Text: We optimize every touchpoint with AI, virtual communities and business intelligence.
services.s3Text: Happy teachers, vibrant communities. Recruitment, emotional salary and leadership.
services.s4Text: CRM, chatbots and workspaces for effective, warm interactions that build loyalty.

footer.desc: Experience and community consulting for schools and companies in Greater Mexico City.

meta.title: Consulting for schools | Be Community
meta.description: Education consulting, teacher coaching, community experience and educational marketing for schools in Greater Mexico City. More retention and belonging.

hero.title: A school families
hero.lead: We help schools build loyal educational communities: higher student retention, engaged families and teachers who stay. With method and warmth.

pains.title: Attrition gives no warning. Belonging can't be improvised.

items.title: Students who leave
items.text: Every family that switches schools takes enrollment, reputation and years of relationship with them. Retention is profitability.

items.title: Teachers who turn over
items.text: Teacher turnover breaks pedagogical continuity and the bond with families. Retaining talent means retaining community.

items.title: Little differentiation
items.text: When everyone promises 'educational quality', experience and belonging are what truly set you apart.

items.title: Distant families
items.text: A community that doesn't feel part of something won't recommend, defend or stay. Belonging is designed.

services.title: Four fronts to transform your educational community.

items.title: Personalized education consulting
items.promise: We design value-added experiences that set your school apart.
points: Value propositions that differ from competitors
items.result: A school that stands out for what's lived, not just what's taught.

items.title: Customer experience in community
items.promise: We optimize every touchpoint between the school and its community.
points: Experience map for students and families
AI, virtual communities and business intelligence
Processes that make every family feel part of it
items.result: Loyal communities that recommend and stay.

items.title: Teacher talent coaching
items.promise: Happy teachers build unforgettable educational experiences.
items.result: Less turnover, more commitment and a better climate.

items.title: Differentiated educational marketing
items.promise: We communicate what makes your school unique to attract new families.
points: Positioning as a reference in your area
Integration into the Be Community network
items.result: More interested families and a brand that endures.

method.title: From diagnosis to community, in four steps.

steps.title: Diagnosis
steps.text: We listen to your community and measure the real experience of students, families and teachers.

steps.title: Design
steps.text: We create tailored strategies based on your school's needs and identity.

steps.title: Implementation
steps.text: We support the rollout with tools, processes and technology.

steps.title: Measurement
steps.text: We track indicators and adjust to sustain results.

items.title: Higher retention
items.text: Less attrition and a more stable enrollment year over year.

items.title: Engaged families
items.text: A community that participates, recommends and defends your school.

items.title: Better teacher climate
items.text: Motivated teams that stay and raise the experience.

items.title: Differentiated brand
items.text: A school recognized for its community and its experience.

items.q: How is Be Community different from a marketing agency?
items.a: We don't just communicate: we redesign your community's entire experience —students, families and teachers— so retention and belonging are real, not just a message.

items.q: Do you work with schools of any size?
items.a: Yes. We adapt the scope to the size and stage of each school, from small institutions to large communities.

items.q: How long does an engagement last?
items.a: It depends on the diagnosis. We design phased plans with clear deliverables and continuous measurement so you see progress within the first weeks.

items.q: Do you serve schools outside Mexico City?
items.a: Our base is in Greater Mexico City, but we support schools in other regions both in person and remotely.
With an initial diagnosis. Book a consult and let's talk about your community's needs.

meta.title: Customer Experience consulting | Be Community
meta.description: CX consulting, digital transformation and brand loyalty for companies and SMBs in Greater Mexico City. Turn customers into community.

hero.title: Turn customers
hero.lead: We help companies and SMBs build experiences that create loyalty: customers who come back, recommend and stay. Customer Experience consulting with human warmth.

pains.title: A satisfied customer buys. A customer who belongs, stays.

items.title: Customers who don't return
items.text: Winning a new customer costs far more than keeping one. Loyalty is your most profitable asset.

items.title: Inconsistent experience
items.text: When every touchpoint feels different, the brand loses trust. Consistency builds loyalty.

items.title: Cold processes
items.text: Poorly implemented technology pushes people away. Done right, it makes every interaction feel close.

items.title: Deciding without data
items.text: Without measuring the experience, improving it is guessing. What isn't measured isn't managed.

services.title: Everything you need to build customer loyalty.

items.title: Customer Experience consulting
items.promise: We analyze and redesign your customers' experience.
items.result: Experiences that set your brand apart from competitors.

items.title: Digital transformation
items.promise: We optimize every touchpoint with the right technology.

items.title: Community and brand loyalty
items.promise: We turn your customers into a community that recommends you.
items.result: Customers who stay and bring others.

items.title: Business intelligence
items.promise: We measure the experience to make better decisions.
items.result: Decisions based on data, not hunches.

method.title: From friction to loyalty, in four steps.

steps.title: CX diagnosis
steps.text: We measure the current state of your customers' experience and detect friction.

steps.title: Journey design
steps.text: We redesign every touchpoint with a customer focus.

steps.title: Implementation
steps.text: We roll out the digital tools that make the difference.

steps.title: Measure & improve
steps.text: We track indicators and optimize continuously.

items.title: Higher retention
items.text: Customers who return and grow their value over time.

items.title: A recommended brand
items.text: Loyal customers who become your best promoters.

items.title: Efficient processes
items.text: Technology that saves time and improves every interaction.

items.title: Data-driven decisions
items.text: Clear visibility of the experience to improve with certainty.

items.q: What is Customer Experience and why does it matter?
items.a: It's the sum of every perception your customer has when interacting with your brand. A good experience raises retention, referrals and the value of each customer.
Yes. We design solutions tailored to small and medium businesses, with scope and budget matched to your stage.
We work with CRM, chatbots, workspaces and business-intelligence dashboards, always chosen for your real needs.

items.q: Do I need to already have a CRM?
items.a: No. We can start from scratch: we help you choose and implement the right tools for your operation.

items.q: Do you serve companies outside Mexico City?
items.a: Our base is in Greater Mexico City and we support companies in other regions both in person and remotely.
